5.11.125.en: Fixed radar sensor classification and added new device fingerprints for Tuya Zigbee.

5.11.122.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.122: Fixed lux clamp issue and updated fingerprints.

5.11.121.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.121 adds new device variants and fixes issues with LEAPMW DP109/119 distance reporting.

5.11.120.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.120 adds new device variants and fixes distance drop issue for radar sensors.

5.11.119.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.119 adds new device variants and updates drivers, now with .

5.11.118.en: Added WiFi Camera driver (Tuya IPC) with local control and RTSP/snapshot streaming support.

5.11.117.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.117: Restored forum integration and updated drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.116.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.116 includes a batch state update feature for improved device management.

5.11.115.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.115 fixes driver bugs and updates device fingerprints.

5.11.114.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.114 adds new  scripts and updates drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.113.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.113: Added 8 new device fingerprints, total 4258 fingerprints.

5.11.110.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.110 adds 28 new drivers and 1,105 new fingerprints, improving device compatibility.

5.11.109.en: Updated Universal Tuya Zigbee app to v5.11.109 with new drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.108.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.108 adds new device fingerprints and integrates SDK3 improvements for enhanced device support.

5.11.107.en: Added support for new rain sensor device and improved fingerprint scanning with JohanBendz SDK3.

5.11.106.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.106 adds new device fingerprints and updates diagnostics.

5.11.105.en: Added TuyaZigbeeBridge for improved driver pairing and control, updated diagnostics.

5.11.104.en: Added support for Zigbee sub-device control via Tuya gateway and updated drivers and fingerprints.

5.11.126.en: v5.11.125: Moved `_TZE284_bquwrqh1` from `presence_sensor_radar` to `motion_sensor` to correct sensor classification., Added new fingerprints:, Conducted a comprehensive diagnostic analysis and resolved various issues., Updated forum state.
